description_long: This hamburger features a soft, slightly wrinkled plain white bun with a golden-brown top and a pale underside. The interior reveals a thick, juicy beef patty, topped with a layer of melted yellow cheese and what appears to be sautéed mushrooms or onions, along with a hint of reddish sauce. The bun is pierced by a wooden skewer, likely to hold the layers together. The patty is well-cooked and visibly moist, with the cheese oozing over its edges. The cross-section shows the bun's airy texture and the layered arrangement of the fillings. No lettuce, tomato, or pickles are visible, giving the burger a simple, hearty appearance.
description: A thick hamburger with a plain white bun, beef patty, melted cheese, and sautéed toppings, held together by a wooden skewer. The cross-section reveals a juicy, layered interior.
description_view_0: The cross-section displays the interior layers: beef patty, melted cheese, sautéed toppings, and the airy bun.
description_view_1: The back of the hamburger shows the rounded, golden-brown top bun and the thick patty beneath, with the skewer piercing through.
description_view_2: A side view highlights the full, puffy bun and the patty sandwiched between the top and bottom buns.
description_view_3: Another cross-sectional angle, emphasizing the melted cheese and toppings between the bun halves.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Melted cheese and sautéed toppings are layered directly on top of the beef patty, with sauce visible between the patty and the bun. The toppings are concentrated in the center, with no leafy greens or tomato slices present.
